journal.title: Rijista
journal.description: Rijistar yau da kullum tare da fitattun abubuwa da godiya
journal.callout: Rubuta a 'yanci — 'yan layukan gaskiya sun fi shigar cikakkiya. Kwafi wannan shafi ga kowace sabuwar rana.
journal.todaysLogHint: Me ya faru yau? Yaya ya sa ka ji?

taskList.title: Jerin Ayyuka
taskList.description: Yau, wannan mako, da daga baya
taskList.callout: Yi alama yayin ci gaba. Ja ayyuka tsakanin sassan idan tsare-tsare suka canza.
taskList.todayFollowUp: Bibi abubuwan da suka rago daga jiya
taskList.laterPark: Adana ra'ayoyin nan gaba anan don kar a manta da su
taskList.doneHint: Ja ayyukan da aka gama nan don bita mai gamsarwa na mako.

habitTracker.title: Mai bibiyar halaye
habitTracker.callout: Yi alama da ✓ a kowane tantaccu yayin da kake tafiya. Kanana jerin sun fi manyan tsare-tsare.
habitTracker.reviewEasiest: Wane hali ya fi sauƙin kiyayewa?
habitTracker.reviewTweak: Canja ɗaya don mako mai zuwa

readingList.title: Jerin karatu
readingList.description: Karantawa yanzu, jeri, da maganganun da aka fi so
readingList.callout: Ajiye duk abin da kake son karantawa a wuri guda. Matsar da abubuwa sama lokacin da ka fara su.
readingList.readingNowChild: Inda na tsaya, da tunani har zuwa yanzu
readingList.finishedItem: Misalin karatun da aka gama — ƙara sharhin layi ɗaya
readingList.quotesHint: Kwafi wani layi da ya ratsa zuciyarka

meetingNotes.title: Bayanan taro
meetingNotes.description: Ajanda, yanke shawara, da abubuwan aiki masu mallaka
meetingNotes.callout: Shafi ɗaya a kowace taro. Bada kowane abun aiki mai shi kafin taro ya ƙare.
meetingNotes.decisionsCallout: Menene aka yanke shawara, kuma me ya sa?
meetingNotes.actionItemTodo: Mai shi — aiki da kwanan wata
meetingNotes.nextMeetingHint: Kwanan wata da batutuwan da za a ci gaba

oneOnOne.title: Bayanan 1:1
oneOnOne.description: Shafi mai ci gaba don tarurrukan 1:1 akai-akai
oneOnOne.callout: Shafi mai ci gaba don tarurrukan 1:1 akai-akai — ƙara sabon taken kwanan wata a saman kowane lokaci.
oneOnOne.winsHint: Abu da ya cancanci a yi murna
oneOnOne.feedbackHint: Abu ɗaya da za a kiyaye, abu ɗaya da za a daidaita
oneOnOne.growthHint: Manufofi na dogon lokaci — sake dubawa sau ɗaya a wata
oneOnOne.actionItemMine: Nawa — abin da na yi alkawari
oneOnOne.actionItemTheirs: Nasu — abin da suka yi alkawari

projectBrief.title: Bayyanin aiki
projectBrief.description: Manufa, iyaka, muhimman matakai, da haɗura
projectBrief.callout: Cika taƙaitaccen layi ɗaya da farko. Idan ba za ka iya ba, aikin ba a ayyana shi ba tukuna.
projectBrief.overviewHint: Me muke yi, ga wa, kuma me yasa yanzu?
projectBrief.goalsExample: Misali: Masu amfani masu aiki a mako-mako
projectBrief.inScopeHint: Abin da wannan aikin zai bayar
projectBrief.outScopeHint: Abubuwan da aka cire a sarari — wanda ke hana fadada iyaka
projectBrief.risksHint: Kasada — da yadda za mu rage ta

productSpec.title: Spec ɗin samfur
productSpec.description: Matsala, buƙatu, da jerin abubuwan ƙaddamarwa
productSpec.callout: Bayani na ƙayyadaddun abubuwa don daidaitawa ne, ba takardu ba — a sanya kowane sashe gajere don karantawa cikin minti ɗaya.
productSpec.problemHint: Wane ne ke fama da wahala a yau, kuma ta yaya muka sani?
productSpec.nonGoalsHeading: Abubuwan da ba za a yi ba
productSpec.nonGoalsHint: Abin da wannan ba zai yi da gangan ba
productSpec.niceToHaveTodo: Ya dace a yi idan lokaci ya ba da izini
productSpec.openQuestionsHeading: Tambayoyin da ba a warware ba
productSpec.openQuestionsHint: Mene ne har yanzu yana buƙatar amsa, kuma daga waye?

decisionLog.title: Rijistar Shawara
decisionLog.description: Mahallin, zaɓuɓɓuka da aka kwatanta, da sakamako
decisionLog.callout: Rubuta yanke shawara a lokacin da aka yanke su — kai na gaba zai yi tambaya me ya sa.
decisionLog.statusValue: An gabatar · An karɓa · An maye gurbinsa
decisionLog.decisionCallout: Jumla ɗaya — abin da muka yanke
decisionLog.consequencesHint: Abin da ke sauƙaƙawa da abin da ke wahalarwa
decisionLog.followUpTodo: Mai shi — aikin da ya biyo baya

weeklyPlan.title: Shirin Mako
weeklyPlan.description: Abubuwa uku masu fifiko da jadawalin kowace rana
weeklyPlan.callout: Shirya a ranar Litinin, bita a ranar Juma'a. Abubuwan fifiko uku sun fi goma.
weeklyPlan.priorityFirst: Dole a kammala a wannan mako
weeklyPlan.reviewNextWeek: Menene zai koma mako mai zuwa?

classNotes.title: Rubuce-rubucen Darasi
classNotes.description: Mahimman ra'ayoyi, kalmomi, da tambayoyin bita
classNotes.callout: Rubuta tambayoyi da kalmominka yayin sauraro, kuma ka bita su cikin kwana ɗaya.
classNotes.keyIdeaConnect: Yadda ta haɗa da abin da na sani
classNotes.reviewMisunderstood: Abin da ban fahimta sosai ba

researchNotes.title: Bayanan Bincike
researchNotes.callout: Shafi ɗaya kowace tushe. Ka raba abin da tushe ya ce daga tunaninka.
researchNotes.summaryHint: Hujja a cikin jimloli biyu ko uku
researchNotes.quotesHint: Kalmomin ainihi, tare da lambar shafi
researchNotes.thoughtsAgree: Inda na yarda ko na ƙi, da dalili
